patch_history.raw: Sky Smoke Fixed a bug where his equip pose was displaying unintended VFX when viewed far away. v
Sky Smoke and Orbital Strike Tactical map updated for better readability v
Stim Beacon Increased fire rate reduced from 15% >>> 10% Increased movement speed reduced from 15% >>> 10% v

all_changes.context_label: Stim Beacon Increased fire rate reduced from
Increased movement speed reduced from

patch_history.raw: Orbital Strike The map icon is now removed at the same time the area of effect is turned off. Previously, it lingered while the effect faded out which exceeded when it was visible to players. v

all_changes.context_label: removed at the same time the area of effect is turned off
all_changes.description: removed at the same time the area of effect is turned off

patch_history.raw: Sky Smoke Will now play cast audio within 12.5 meters for allies v
Orbital Strike Fixed an issue where the visuals drew underneath the map v
Incendiary Molotov audio has been updated to be easier to hear, especially when placed underneath smokes. v
Stim Beacon Equip time after casting adjusted from Normal >>> Fast Sky Smoke Improved the performance around Sky Smoke dissipation effect v

patch_history.raw: Sky Smoke Visual cues have been added to the inside of the smoke before it expires. v

all_changes.context_label: added to the inside of the smoke before it expires
all_changes.description: added to the inside of the smoke before it expires

patch_history.raw: Orbital Strike AOE windup/activation audio integration have been updated from being positioned directly on the Agent when in the AOE to being slightly directional toward the origin of the AOE to allow you to know which direction to travel in, in order to escape. v
Stim Beacon Increased rate of fire to have consistent recoil control that matches the default rate of fire. v

Incendiary Improvement to spread more consistently and only apply damage in places that are consistent with the visuals Sky Smoke and Orbital Strike Can now ping and see additional icons on maps used for ability targeting Undocumented Incendiary Now damages map objects v

patch_history.raw: Incendiary Fixed an issue with VFX not appearing unless the player is observing the direction it is coming from v
Sky Smoke Radius increased 410 >>> 415 UI targeting size updated so that outer edge properly reflects the size of the smoke v

patch_history.raw: Sky Smoke Smokes play an audio and visual cue 1.5 seconds before they are about to fade. v

patch_history.raw: Orbital Strike Fixed issue where Orbital Strike did not damage the cocoon of ’s Annihilation. v

patch_history.raw: Sky Smoke and Orbital Strike Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where its map UI would not render when swapping to his perspective. Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where Agents with an ability map UI would repeatedly play their equip animation when switching to their POV. Console-only[] v
